⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

we late again! i have no excuse this time chat. i honestly lost track of time because i was playing fire emblem three houses again. i had this mostly done too. 🫠 forgive me?

anyway, here we go. i honestly changed the idol for this one like 4 different times because i genuinely could not decide. also, the jai image filters are going to be the death of me.

would you guys wanna see a san version of this one? he was very close to being the subject, but i changed it again at the last second. idk, it really just felt out of character. but please, let me know~

anyway, i'm going back to my video james. tysm for all the support, i can't believe we're over halfway through kinktober now!!
